nodes.title: Collet Init Strategy
nodes.summary: Render the app first, then call init({ lazy: true }) so Collet can auto-detect the initial route and keep WASM off the blocking path.
nodes.payload: This repo no longer initializes Collet before React mounts. The mounted DOM is the source for initial-route auto-detection, and the lazy init keeps startup non-blocking.

nodes.title: WASM Preload Disabled
nodes.summary: Keep Collet WASM preload disabled in vite.config.ts unless profiling proves eager preload is worth the critical-path cost.
nodes.payload: This docs app uses colletPlugin({ preload: false, prerender: true }) because preload: true undercuts the lazy-init startup strategy and drags wasm_api_bg.wasm into the initial network path.

nodes.title: Docs Version Source of Truth
nodes.summary: src/docs/registry.ts owns the published Collet docs version string, which propagates into llms.txt, JSON exports, and UI badges.
nodes.payload: When the Collet packages are bumped, update COLLET_VERSION in src/docs/registry.ts and regenerate the machine-readable docs outputs. Do not patch generated exports by hand.

nodes.title: Docs Validation Procedure
nodes.summary: After docs or metadata edits, run npm run docs:exports and npm run typecheck before considering the change complete.
nodes.payload: The generated AI docs under public/ai/ and public/llms.txt are build artifacts. Update the source files first, then regenerate exports, then typecheck. Build is the final confidence pass for larger changes.

nodes.title: Message API Naming Mismatch
nodes.summary: Grouped MessageGroupPart data uses snake_case keys, while standalone MessagePart props use camelCase names.
nodes.payload: This is an intentional docs warning because it is easy to drift here: tool_name vs toolName, thinking_label vs thinkingLabel, tool_status vs toolStatus. Message docs should call this out explicitly.

nodes.title: Shared Message Examples
nodes.summary: Message examples and workflow snippets belong in src/docs/messagesContent.ts so the guide page and component previews stay aligned.
nodes.payload: When the message API changes, update the shared message example source first. MessagesPage.tsx and ComponentPreviews.tsx should consume those exports instead of maintaining inline copies.

nodes.title: Generated Docs Artifacts
nodes.summary: public/ai/*.json and public/llms.txt are generated outputs. They should reflect source changes, not become the source of truth.
nodes.payload: Generated docs exports are meant for AI consumption and publishing. Human edits belong in source files under src/, scripts/, and local guidance docs. The graph should remind the editor when they are touching generated surfaces.
